projects.name: PDF-RAG-Chatbot
projects.description: AI-powered PDF chatbot built using a full RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline. Users can upload any PDF document and ask natural language questions. The system ingests the document, creates vector embeddings using FAISS, and uses Mistral AI as the LLM to generate context-aware answers. Built with Streamlit for the frontend and SQLite for persistent chat history.
highlights: Full RAG pipeline with document ingestion and chunking
FAISS vector store for semantic similarity search
Mistral AI as the language model
Persistent chat history with SQLite
Interactive Streamlit UI

projects.name: Job-Application-Tracker
projects.description: A full-featured job application management tool built with Streamlit. Allows users to track job applications with status updates, analytics dashboards, and user authentication. Helps job seekers organize their entire job search process efficiently with data visualization and CSV reporting.
highlights: User authentication system
Application status tracking — Applied, Interview, Offer, Rejected
Analytics dashboard with charts and insights
CSV export functionality
Clean and intuitive Streamlit UI

projects.name: AI Portfolio with RAG Chatbot
projects.description: This very portfolio website — a production-ready AI-powered portfolio built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript frontend and FastAPI backend. Features a floating RAG chatbot (SK-Bot) powered by LangChain, ChromaDB, HuggingFace embeddings, and Mistral AI. Contact form auto-saves to CSV, SQLite DB, and Excel simultaneously.
highlights: Floating RAG chatbot with ChromaDB + Mistral AI
Triple contact storage — CSV, SQLite, Excel
Dark cyberpunk UI with particle animations
FastAPI backend with rate limiting and XSS protection
HuggingFace sentence-transformers embeddings

projects.name: Kubernetes CI/CD Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end DevOps CI/CD pipeline with Kubernetes orchestration, Terraform Infrastructure as Code, Jenkins automation, and AWS cloud deployment. Implements full GitOps workflow with monitoring via Prometheus and Grafana. Demonstrates production-grade infrastructure automation.
highlights: Full GitOps workflow from commit to production
Terraform infrastructure as code for AWS
Jenkins CI/CD automation pipeline
Kubernetes deployment manifests
Prometheus + Grafana monitoring stack

summary: Suryanandan has built projects spanning AI/RAG systems, full-stack web applications, and DevOps automation pipelines. His flagship project is a PDF RAG Chatbot combining LangChain, Mistral AI, and FAISS. He also built a Job Application Tracker with Streamlit, this AI-powered portfolio, and is currently building a full Kubernetes CI/CD pipeline on AWS.
